exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Hang Clean
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in one hand and lower it between your legs in a deadlift motion. 

Explosively pull the kettlebell up to shoulder height, then lower it back down. Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm High Pull
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in one hand between your feet with your arm straight.

2.Extend your hips and raise the kettlebell up to just below your chin, keeping your elbow above your hand, keeping the kettlebell close to your body.

3.Bring the kettlebell down returning to starting position.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Jerk
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright with one hand holding the kettlebell resting at the bicep, the other hand either resting on the side or used for balance.

2.Dip slightly at your hips and knees and rapidly press the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm 

3.Return to starting position.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Kickstand Swing
exercises.alternateName: split staggered stance single arm swing
exercises.description:
Hold kettlebell in one hand, with one leg back for balance. Swing the kettlebell between your legs and thrust your hips forward. 

This targets the core, glutes, and shoulders.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Overhead Squat
exercises.description:
1) Stand upright holding one kettlebell overhead with your arm fully extended. The other hand for balance.

2) Lower your body toward the floor, bending at the hips and knees, keeping your arm extended overhead. 

3) Push through your feet returning to starting position, keeping your back flat and the kettlebell overhead.

4) Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Row
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, you want to ensure a safe back with a slight arch through your spine. 

2.In order to pull from the back, you want to really move your shoulder back opening up your chest. 

3. Place the Kettlebell in front of your feet. Bend your knees slightly and push your butt out as much as possible. As you bend over to get into the starting position grab the Kettlebell by the handle.

4. Pull the Kettlebell off of the floor. Retract the shoulder blade of the working side, as you flex the elbow, drawing the Kettlebell towards your stomach or rib cage.

5.When you complete one side, do the other arm.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Shoulder Press
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright holding a kettlebell in one hand, making sure it's resting on your shoulder.

2.Press up, keeping the palm either opened or fully grasping the bell.

3.Lower the pressed kettlebell returning to starting position.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Snatch
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in one hand between your feet with your arm straight. The other hand for balance.

2.Thrust your hips forward, pulling the kettlebell straight up overhead, catching it at the top with your arm straight.

3.Absorb the kettlebell at the top by dipping at the hips and knees slightly, keeping your arm straight, keeping the kettlebell close to your body throughout.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Snatch to Overhead Squat
exercises.description:
Start with a kettlebell on the floor in one hand, feet shoulder-width apart. In one explosive motion, snatch the kettlebell overhead, fully extending your arm. 

Once the kettlebell is overhead, maintain a strong core and shoulder stability as you lower into a squat, keeping the kettlebell directly above your head. 

Stand back up while keeping the kettlebell overhead and repeat

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Split Jerk
exercises.description:
1) Stand upright holding a kettlebell in one hand, making sure it's resting on your shoulder.

2) Dip slightly at your hips and knees.

3) Rapidly press the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm while also splitting your feet front to back, absorbing the bell at the top in a split squat.

4) Return to starting position. Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Squat Clean
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in one hand between your feet with your arm straight. The other hand for balance.

2.Thrust your hips forward pulling the kettlebells straight up, catching them at shoulder height, bending at the elbows.

3.Absorb the kettlebells at your shoulders by full squat, keeping the kettlebell close to your body throughout.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Squat Clean and Jerk
exercises.alternateName: KB SA Squat Clean Jerk Push
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in one hand at your shins, arm straight, the other hand for balance.

2.ln one motion rapidly raise the kettlebell to your shoulder level.

3.Rapidly extend your hips and knees, pulling the kettlebell up, keeping your arm straight and shrugging your shoulders. Drop down as the kettlebell travel up and absorb them in a low squat

4.Stand upright with the dumbbell at shoulder height. Then return to starting position. Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Squat Clean and Press
exercises.alternateName: KB SA Clean Squat and shoulder press
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in one hand at your shins with your arm straight, the other hand for balance.

2.Thrust your hips forward and pull the kettlebell straight up, catch it at shoulder height, dipping at the hips and knees.

3.Quickly push the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm and legs fully.

4.Bring the kettlebell at shoulder height, then return to starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Squat Snatch
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in one hand between your feet, arm straight, the other hand for balance.

2.Thrust your hips forward, pulling the kettlebell straight up overhead, catching it at the top with your arm straight.

3.Absorb the kettlebell at the top by dipping at the hips and knees slightly, keeping your arm straight. Then return to starting to position.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Strict Press
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, you want to ensure your shoulder’s safety. When you lockout your arm overhead, keep your bicep close to your ear. 

2. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces inward. This will be your starting position.

3. Press the kettlebell up and out until it is locked out overhead.

4.Lower the kettlebell back to your shoulder under control and repeat. 

5.When you complete one arm, then do the other.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Swing
exercises.description:
1. When performing this exercise, you want to ensure back safety. Keep a slight arch in your back at the bottom of the swing. 

2. You also want to make your core engaged at the top. 

3. Place the kettlebell between your feet. Push back with your butt, bend your knees and look straight ahead to get into the starting position.

4 Swing the kettlebell between your legs forcefully. Quickly reverse the direction and drive though with your hips taking the kettlebell straight out. 

5.Let the kettlebell swing back between your legs and repeat. 

6.When you complete the set on one side, do the other arm.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Swing Long
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell with one hand and swing it between your legs before explosively swinging it forward and up to eye level. 

Keep your core engaged and hips driving the movement.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Leg Dead Lift Clean to Press
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in one hand and stand on the same side leg as the kettlebell, keeping a slight bend in the knee. 

Hinge at the hips and lower the kettlebell toward the floor while lifting the free leg slightly behind you in a single-leg deadlift. 

As you return to standing on your supporting leg, clean the kettlebell to shoulder height and immediately press it overhead. 

Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Leg Dead Lift to Snatch
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in one hand and stand on the opposite leg of the kettlebell, keeping a slight bend in the knee. 

Hinge at the hips and lower the kettlebell toward the floor while lifting the free leg slightly behind you in a single-leg deadlift. 

As you return to standing on your supporting leg, snatch the kettlebell overhead in one explosive motion. 

Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Leg Deadlift
exercises.description:
1)  When performing the deadlift, ensure you have a safe back. Keep your back slightly arched or in neutral position. 

2) As you perform your deadlift, sit back into your heel and keep your front knee back on your standing leg. 

3) Stand on one leg, on the same side that you hold the kettlebell. 

4) Keeping that knee slightly bent, perform a stiff-legged deadlift by bending at the hip, extending your free leg behind you for balance. 

5) Continue lowering the kettlebell then return starting position.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Leg Ipsilateral Deadlift
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in the same hand as the leg you're standing on. 

Hinge at the hips and lower the kettlebell towards the ground while balancing on one leg. 

Return to standing. Alternate legs.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Leg Ipsilateral Skater Squat
exercises.description:
Stand on one leg, holding a kettlebell in the same-side hand. Lower into a squat, extending the free leg behind you. 

Engage your core, and return to standing.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Leg Squat
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright holding a kettlebell by your side with your feet flat, shoulder-width apart.

2.Slowly lower your body into a squat position with foot on the same side holding the kettlebell, the other foot off the floor.

3.Push through your heels returning to starting position, keeping your back flat and head up throughout the movement.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Racked Curtsy Lunge
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell or dumbbell in the front rack position (by your shoulder). 

Perform a curtsy lunge with the same side leg stepping behind. Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Racked Slider Lateral Lunge
exercises.alternateName: Kettlebell racked single arm single leg slider side lunge
exercises.description: Perform a lateral lunge with a slider under one foot, holding a kettlebell or dumbbell in a racked position on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Racked Slider Reverse Lunge Contralateral
exercises.description: Perform a reverse lunge with a slider under the opposite foot, holding a kettlebell or dumbbell in a racked position.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single Racked Slider Reverse Lunge Ipsilateral
exercises.description: Perform a reverse lunge with a slider under the same-side foot, holding a kettlebell or dumbbell in a racked position.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Skater Squat
exercises.alternateName: Double Kettlebell single leg balance squat
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in front of you. 

Perform a single-leg squat, reaching the kettlebell toward the opposite foot. 

Keep the chest upright and core engaged.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Slider Reverse Lunge Contralateral
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell or dumbbell in one hand, with the opposite foot on a slider. 

Step back into a reverse lunge, focusing on control and maintaining balance.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Slider Reverse Lunge Ipsilateral
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell or dumbbell in one hand, with the same-side foot on a slider. 

Step back into a reverse lunge, maintaining control and stability.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Snatch
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in each hand at your shins with your arms straight.

2.Thrust your hips forward and pull the kettlebells straight up overhead, arms extended.

3.Maintaining the kettlebells straight overhead, stand upright, legs extended.

4.Quickly lower the kettlebells at shoulder height, then return to starting position. Repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Snatch to Jump Swtich
exercises.description:
Start in a split stance with the kettlebell in the hand opposite your forward leg. 

Hinge slightly at the hips and engage your core. In one explosive motion, snatch the kettlebell overhead while simultaneously jumping and switching legs mid-air. 

Land softly in a split stance with the opposite leg forward, holding the kettlebell overhead on the same side as the new forward leg. 

Repeat continuously, maintaining control and stability throughout the movement.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Split Squat
exercises.description:
Stand with one foot forward and the other foot behind you in a split stance. 

Hold a kettlebell in each hand at your sides, then lower your body into a squat by bending both knees. Push back up. 

This targets quads, glutes, and improves balance.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Split Squat Racked
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in the rack position (at shoulder height) while in a split stance. 

Lower into a squat, keeping the kettlebell close to your body. 

This focuses on legs, glutes, and shoulders.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Split Stance Bent Over Row
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in each hand and step one foot back into a split stance. 

Hinge at the hips and pull the kettlebells toward your torso in a rowing motion. 

This strengthens the back, shoulders, and arms.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Squat Snatch
exercises.description:
1.Squat holding a kettlebell in each hand at your shins with your arms straight.

2.Thrust your hips forward and pull the kettlebells straight up overhead, arms extended.

3.Maintaining the kettlebells straight overhead, stand upright, legs extended.

4.Lower kettlebells to return to starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Squat to Shoulder Press
exercises.description:
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a single kettlebell at chest level. 

Lower into a squat by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, keeping your chest upright and core engaged. 

Push through your heels to return to standing, then press the kettlebell overhead. Lower it back to chest level and repeat continuously.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Standing Alternating Overhead Press
exercises.description:
Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.

Press one kettlebell overhead, then lower it and press the other overhead. Alternate sides. 

This targets shoulders, arms, and engages the core.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Standing Overhead Press
exercises.description:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. 

Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, then press them overhead by extending your arms. 

Lower back down. Focuses on shoulders, triceps, and core stability.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Sumo Deadlift
exercises.description:
1) To set your feet in a proper position, get a wide stance. 

2) Turn your feet out so that they’re facing roughly 45 degrees. 

3) Bend and grab the kettlebell with both hands. 

4) Extend your body to a standing position 

5) Repeat.
